titleStmt.title: SII 9.252: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 252. (A.R. No. 46 of 1904.) ON THE 3RD SLAB BUILT INTO THE PLATFORM OF THE KUMARASVAMI TEMPLE AT KUDATINI, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated the 10th year of the reign of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva (II), Vibhava, Saṅkrānti, Sūrya-grahaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1148 April 20 on which day the only solar eclipse in the year occurred. Vṛishabha-saṅkrānti, however, took place four days later i.e., on the 24th. Mallidēva, son of Dēkarasa of Śāṇḍilya-gōtra and of Vipra-vaṁśa and the father of Paṇḍitapārijāta Kēśava or Kēśirāja, is stated to have made a gift of some land for a satra for feeding the Kappaḍi pilgrims coming on a pilgrimage to the Śatakōṭi tīrtha at Koṭṭitoṇe. The gift was made in the presence of Madhava-Brahmachāriyarasa and the five Vargas of Koṭṭitoṇe.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ścuṁbicaṁdracāma
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
vārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgra(ṁ)viśrāṁta(ṁ)bhu
svāmikumārāya dripyattārakavidviṣē Adhaṣkritamayūrāya
na dyadhikaśaktayē . pātu vō viśyavighnaikakhaṁḍanaḥ phaṇimaṁḍanaḥ saṁ
pāditajaganmekhyavaṁdanaḥ sthāṇunaṁdanaḥ . sarasijanābhanōdarasarōjade puṭṭi
viriṁci lōkamaṁ viracisi bēṟevēṟe riṣimārggama nirmmisalājñavalki vistarisi
da vājivaṁśadoḷe puṭṭida nākanadīndukīrtti dēkarasanagaṇyapuṇyanidhi saccaritāṁbudhi sauryyasaṁni
śrīkamaḷōdarapadayugakōkanadāmōdacaṁcarīkaṁ guṇaratnākaranenisute
dhareyoḷ dēkarasaṁ vipravaṁśacūḍāratna . śrīśāṁḍalyavinūtagōtra manucā
ritraṁ vivēkōttarāvāsaṁ dēkarasaṁge sadguṇamahīsaṁjāte caṁdavvegaṁtāśāvarttitakīrtti
śiṣṭareḍarggīvaṁ mallidēvaṁ dvijāgrēśaṁ puṭṭida puṭṭidaṁtudadhiyoḷgīrvvāṇadhātrīruhaṁ .
vanajajanaṁte vinītaṁ vanajātārātiyaṁte kuvaḷeyasēvyaṁ janahitadoḷu malla
rasaṁ vinūtaśāṁḍilyagōtranamaḷacaritraṁ . kuṁdada dānadoḷsuraghanāghanamaṁ vibudhāḷisē
veyoḷmaṁdarasaiḷamaṁ caritadoḷmanuvaṁ nayadiṁde pōlva kuṁdēṁdujaśāṁka mallarasanaṁ dhare baṇni
sutirku śiṣṭamākaṁdavasaṁtanaṁ sakaḷabaṁdhujanāśaitakalpabhūjanaṁ . śrīra
maṇīśanaṁghaisarasīruhaśaṭpadaniṣṭaśiṣṭanistāraka ma
lladēvavibhugaṁ vinayānvite hōcikavvegaṁbhōrhagarbhbha
vaṁśatilakaṁ guṇi kēśavadēva puṭṭidaṁ kṣīrapayōdhiyoḷtoḷe
pa pūrṇnakaḷādhara puṭṭidaṁdadi . bhārati mukhadoḷkaḷpōrvvīruhasa
hajāte kūrttu vakṣasthaḷadoḷu cārutaravirppareṁdaḍe dhā
riṇiyoḷu kēśi ninna doreyarumoḷarē . dore harapuṁgavakke
samanaṁbarasiṁdhuge pāṭi tārabhūdharakeṇe yiṁdradaṁtigenipujjva
ḷakīrttiya kēśirājanaṁ dhare pogaḷuttamirkku kamaḷōdarapādapa
yōjabhriṁganaṁ paravadhumātariśvatanūjātana paṁḍitapārijātana .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvaru kalyāṇadoḷu su
khasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire 10 neya vibhava
saṁvatsaradalu saṁkrānti sūryyagrahaṇa nimittavāgi . sama
dhigatapaṁcamahāśabda bratajapahōmaniyamasaṁyukta śrī
svāmikārttikēyadēvatapōvanādhipatigaḷappa śrīmaddaṁḍāsani
lōhāsani mādhavabrahmacāriyarasaru . svastyānēkayugabartta
mānamahimāspadamahāprasiddhaśuddhānvayasamastavi
śiṣṭajanādhāraru śrīsvāmikārttikēyadēvaśrīpādapadmō

pajīvigaḷumappa śrīmatu koṭṭitoṇeya sthānadaydu
varggamumirddalli śatakōṭitīrtthada śrīsvāmidēva
ra saṁnidhānadalu svāmiyātrege baṁda kappaḍigaḷa satra
kke mallarasa biṭṭa keyi bīḷkuṁṭeya dāriyiṁ baḍaga gavaṟē
śvaradēvageyiṁ paḍuva maṁveyapaṁnasu teṁka bhu 140
ha 23ba 138 mū 9 ma 9 ka 796 hāḷahaṁnasu mārttaṁḍēśva
radēvageyiṁ mūḍa haḍuva bhu 90 ba 10 ... mū 24 . ba 5 ... mū 61
te 16 . matta 6 karuḍikeya maṇalikalla biḷaliṁ mūḍa kōveyana haṁna
su baḍa bhu 40 mū 7 teṁ 37 ha 13 . matta 1 ka 520 diṭṭapageṟeyiṁ
vāyābyadalli catrava ma 90 ba 37 mū 85 . 1 teṁ 32 ma
tta 13 ka 146 mattaṁ keyi modalamaneya haṁnasu bi
yanahaṭṭiya dāriyiṁ ḷiyamaṭhada keyiṁ teṁkaladaṟa bhu
mū 23 ba 92 . ha śrīhaḍapada habarasana ma
ga kalidēvaṁ tannataga keyiṁ baḍaga hiriya
mattaru keyaṁ
jaṁba
damaged
Iṁtī dharmmamaṁ tappade pratipāḷisidarappargge svāmiśatakōṭitīrtthadaluṁ vā
raṇāsikurukṣētradaluṁ caturvvēdapāragarappa sahasra brāhmaṇargge sūryya
grahaṇadaṁdu sahasra savatsakapilegaḷaṁ raupyakhurasuvarṇnaśriṁgāḷaṁkṛtaṁ dānaṁ
geydu phaḷamakkuṁ . Ī dharmmamanaḷidarapparā tithigaḷalā tīrtthadalanibaru brāhma
ṇarumananitu kavilegaḷmanaḷida mahāpātakamakkuṁ . Ī dharmmakke sthānadaydu
varggamuṁ poḍeyarāgi pratipāḷisuvaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁ
dharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasē
turnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarbbānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrān bhū
yō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā pālayaṁti vasuṁ
dharāṁ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 9.252 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
